name: holy-grail
description: One-shot upgrade-anything pipeline. Say 'upgrade X' and it writes the perfect brief, plans it, builds it with subagents, reviews it with a panel of expert agents and an adversarial second opinion, improves until world-class, and self-learns every run. Works on code, UI, copy, and strategy. Self-contained with built-in fallbacks; uses superpowers/codex/gstack when present.
